reconstruction_notes: This artifact is NOT verbatim from a single primary document. Motion sequencing, named mover, named seconder, failed amendment outcome, and approved main motion outcome are reported by Citizen Portal as factual meeting record. Direct quotations attributed to Councilman Chris Nettles and resident Bob Willoughby are presented by Citizen Portal as quoted statements from the meeting. Meridian has not independently validated these quotes against the raw video. This file should be treated as secondary-confirmed narrative, not primary verbatim transcript.
